archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)

design_philosophy.emotion_first: Every deal should feel like an exclusive, time-sensitive win.
design_philosophy.zoom_in: Focus heavily on the discount percentage and the brand logo. These are the main conversion drivers.
design_philosophy.negative_space: Use generous padding around deals so they don't look like spammy coupon sites.
design_philosophy.contrast: Vibrant Orange and Deep Green against crisp white cards and soft gray backgrounds.

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Discount percentages MUST use the highest font weight (font-black) and tightest tracking.
Use 'Outfit' for all numeric figures and prices for high legibility and modern tech feel.
Uppercase tracking for overlines like 'EXPIRES SOON'.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-200 z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-2 pb-safe

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF8C00] hover:bg-[#E67E00] text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,140,0,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(255,140,0,0.23)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#228B22] hover:bg-[#1D771D] text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-gray-200 hover:border-[#FF8C00] text-gray-900 bg-transparent rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.reveal_coupon: relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF8C00] to-[#E67E00] text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-4 w-full group

cards.deal_card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden group p-4
cards.coupon_card: bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-[#FF8C00]/40 p-6 relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center

inputs.default: border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF8C00] focus:border-transparent outline-none w-full text-base
inputs.search: border-0 bg-gray-100 rounded-full px-6 py-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF8C00] outline-none w-full text-lg

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle Y-axis translation (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase.
micro_interactions.active: Scale down to 0.98 for satisfying physical press feel.
micro_interactions.popup: Backdrop blur with scale-in animation (Framer Motion: initial={scale: 0.9, opacity: 0}, animate={scale: 1, opacity: 1}).

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 h-20 flex items-center
navigation.bottom_nav_mobile: visible md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-200 pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)]

icons_and_assets.style: stroke-2, consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-6 h-6 for mobile nav, w-8 h-8 for empty states)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #FF8C00 and #228B22 meets 4.5:1 ratio or use bold font weights.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements MUST have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#FF8C00] focus-visible:ring-offset-2
accessibility.testing: Apply data-testid to all buttons, links, and forms.

design_asset.usage: Use in header or as primary brand reference.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for the 'Reveal Coupon' popup. It needs an attention-grabbing scale-in effect with backdrop-blur-xl.
Implement the Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile views (hidden on md+ screens) mimicking IG viral UI flow.
For the 'Deal Card', ensure the discount amount is the largest text element using Outfit font-black.
In the Admin dashboard, use Shadcn Table for deals and ensure there's a distinct button for 'Bulk CSV Upload'.
Never use generic placeholders. Map the provided URLs to the correct category cards.
Implement 'Copy to Clipboard' on the popup with a success state changing the button color to Green (#228B22).
